x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CIs not updated in 180+ days are unlikely to reflect real infrastructure. These ghost records create AI noise -- Now Assist may suggest remediations for CIs that no longer exist.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Flag 180-day stale CIs for decommission review. Work with asset owners to verify each CI. CIs not updated in 180+ days are likely ghost records that cause Now Assist to recommend remediations for non-existent assets. Target: ≤10% of CIs stale at 180 days.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_faf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CIs not updated in 180+ days are unlikely to reflect real infrastructure. These ghost records create AI noise -- Now Assist may suggest remediations for CIs that no longer exist.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Stale CI Rate (180 days)</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-180);

    var gaStale = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaStale.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaStale.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '<', cutoff.getValue());
    gaStale.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStale.query();
    var stale = gaStale.next() ? parseInt(gaStale.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. 180-day stale CI rate cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((stale / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs not updated in 180+ days (' + stale + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct <= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 180 days. CMDB has minimal ghost records — Now Assist impact analysis will not be polluted by decommissioned assets.' };
    } else if (pct <= 30) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs have not been updated in 180+ days (target: ≤10%). These are likely ghost records — Now Assist may recommend remediations for non-existent assets.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are stale at 180 days. High ghost record rate — Now Assist impact analysis is likely to include significant numbers of decommissioned or non-existent assets.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000380</number><order>80</order><remediation_guidance>Flag 180-day stale CIs for decommission review. Work with asset owners to verify each CI. CIs not updated in 180+ days are likely ghost records that cause Now Assist to recommend remediations for non-existent assets. Target: ≤10% of CIs stale at 180 days.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>faf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Stale CI Rate (180 days)</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_faf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
